title: Ubiquiti UCG-Max, UniFi Cloud Gateway Max
description: UCG-Max is a versatile device from the UniFi Cloud Gateway series. The router features (1) WAN 1/2.5Gbps port and (4) LAN 1/2.5Gbps ports (1 configurable as LAN/WAN). The compact yet powerful design supports multi-WAN functionality, including load balancing, and it also includes IDS/IPS support. The router has implemented support for various types of VPNs , including site-to-site VPN With the integrated UniFi Network application , you can manage up to 30+ UniFi devices and serve up to 300+ connected client devices. Video recordings from the cameras are stored directly on the built-in 512 GB NVMe SSD , which can be replaced with a higher-capacity drive. A 0.96" status display is also included. The device is powered via a USB-C connector, and a power adapter is included in the package 1Gbps routing with IDS/IPS support Integrated UniFi Network application Multi-WAN + load balancing 0.96" LCM display USB-C power Device Patch cable USB-C power adapter (5V/5A)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (4) 10/100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power type USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 16 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 5A Physical characteristics Design Desktop Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Width [mm] 127 Height [mm] 30 Depth [mm] 142 Hardware RAM [MB] 4096 General NAT throughput [Mb/s] 1000
